description: CompositionBlue shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, front buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and pocket on left chestFitRegularWash careHand or machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorations                                                                                             Stylish to the hilt, this shirt from john miller is a great addition to your wardrobe. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this classy shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with formal trousers and black leather shoes for that absolutely classic look.Model statisticsThe product is of size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18”
